parts.text:
Here are the birth dates and birthplaces for the nine current justices of the U.S. Supreme Court, listed in order of seniority.

### 1. Chief Justice John G. Roberts, Jr.
*   **Birth Date:** January 27, 1955
*   **Birthplace:** Buffalo, New York
*   **Source:** [Supreme Court of the United States - Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 2. Clarence Thomas
*   **Birth Date:** June 23, 1948
*   **Birthplace:** Pin Point, Georgia (near Savannah)
*   **Source:** [The Oyez Project](https://www.oyez.org/justices/clarence_thomas) / [Supreme Court Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 3. Samuel A. Alito, Jr.
*   **Birth Date:** April 1, 1950
*   **Birthplace:** Trenton, New Jersey
*   **Source:** [Supreme Court of the United States - Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 4. Sonia Sotomayor
*   **Birth Date:** June 25, 1954
*   **Birthplace:** Bronx, New York
*   **Source:** [Library of Congress - Current Members](https://www.loc.gov/item/n2009030704/sonia-sotomayor/) / [Supreme Court Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 5. Elena Kagan
*   **Birth Date:** April 28, 1960
*   **Birthplace:** New York City, New York
*   **Source:** [Supreme Court of the United States - Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 6. Neil M. Gorsuch
*   **Birth Date:** August 29, 1967
*   **Birthplace:** Denver, Colorado
*   **Source:** [The Oyez Project](https://www.oyez.org/justices/neil_gorsuch) / [Supreme Court Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 7. Brett M. Kavanaugh
*   **Birth Date:** February 12, 1965
*   **Birthplace:** Washington, D.C.
*   **Source:** [Supreme Court of the United States - Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 8. Amy Coney Barrett
*   **Birth Date:** January 28, 1972
*   **Birthplace:** New Orleans, Louisiana
*   **Source:** [The White House (Archived)](https://trumpwhitehouse.archives.gov/people/amy-coney-barrett/) / [Supreme Court Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)

### 9. Ketanji Brown Jackson
*   **Birth Date:** September 14, 1970
*   **Birthplace:** Washington, D.C.
*   **Source:** [The White House - Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson](https://www.whitehouse.gov/kbj/) / [Supreme Court Biographies](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx)
